name: Cardio
description: The Raider's suspicious ability to run away while still explaining why this was tactical.
effectTextByLevel: No measurable benefit. Knees remain theoretical.
Extraction instinct gets a tiny nudge.
Extraction instinct improves, mostly through panic.
Low-HP sprint choices look almost intentional.
Peak emergency jogging. Still not athletic, but louder.
levelUpTextByLevel: Skill acquired: Cardio. Raider discovered lungs can be negotiated with.
Cardio reached Level {level}. Raider now calls fleeing a mobility doctrine.
Cardio reached Level {level}. Breathing noises upgraded from alarming to tactical.
Cardio reached Level {level}. Raider can panic-sprint while complaining in complete sentences.
Cardio reached Level {level}. Raider has become a world-class practitioner of leaving.

name: Hoarding
description: Advanced backpack theology: every bottle cap has a destiny and the destiny is resale value.
effectTextByLevel: No measurable benefit. The backpack is merely a container.
Loot value gets a tiny suspicious bump.
Bonus finds become slightly more likely.
The backpack develops opinions about valuables.
Questionable items arrive with better excuses.
Peak junk magnetism. Desperanza pawn economy trembles.
levelUpTextByLevel: Skill acquired: Hoarding. Raider learned the difference between trash and pre-profit.
Hoarding reached Level {level}. Backpack zipper filed a formal concern.
Hoarding reached Level {level}. Raider can now justify three identical objects as a strategy.
Hoarding reached Level {level}. Inventory management has become a belief system.
Hoarding reached Level {level}. The backpack is now legally a small warehouse.

name: Hiding in Lockers
description: A discipline built on staying very still and hoping robots respect furniture.
effectTextByLevel: No measurable benefit. Lockers remain emotionally supportive only.
Failed robot encounters hurt a little less.
Robot panic damage softens through excellent crouching.
The Raider finds safer corners in unsafe places.
Peak decorative stealth. Nearly indistinguishable from shelving.
levelUpTextByLevel: Skill acquired: Hiding in Lockers. Raider learned that doors can be emotional armor.
Hiding in Lockers reached Level {level}. Raider now closes locker doors with professional fear.
Hiding in Lockers reached Level {level}. Breathing quietly has entered the build.
Hiding in Lockers reached Level {level}. Raider can occupy one square meter with heroic commitment.
Hiding in Lockers reached Level {level}. Raider has achieved furniture-adjacent enlightenment.
